channel.title: Routing on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Routing on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): IP Connectivity and Routing
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Routing" , "OSPF" , "Static Routing" , "IP Connectivity" , "Cisco Certification" , "Routing and Switching" , "Network Architecture" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master IP connectivity for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn the routing table, forwarding decisions, IPv4 and IPv6 static routing, single-area OSPFv2, and first hop redundancy protocols.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Routing Protocols, Concepts, and Optimization
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "Routing" , "Network Protocols" , "Network Management" , "Dynamic Routing" , "Static Routing" , "Bandwidth Management" , "Quality of Service" , "Network Devices"
item.description: Explore the world of routing technologies and concepts, from dynamic routing protocols like RIP, OSPF, EIGRP, and BGP to link state, distance vector, and hybrid routing protocols, as well as the configuration of static routing and default routes.
